comment: G0 pinned corpus. Small, self-contained, permissively-licensed real Python repos. [STIPULATED: PROPOSED-ASM ASM-1050 — G0 repo pool choice; NOT the G1 pool, which must be pinned-before-looking per ASM-1004/1030. These repos were selected by the G0 agent for the NON-SCORED spike only; no G1/G4 number may be quoted from them.]
analyzed_scope: all *.py files under the repo root (tests INCLUDED — fail-closed, no denominator shrinking); a package-source-only secondary stratum (paths containing /test/, /tests/, test_*.py, *_test.py, conftest.py, setup.py, docs/ excluded) is co-reported as a disclosed sensitivity slice [STIPULATED: PROPOSED-ASM ASM-1051]
python_runtime: CPython 3.9.25 (parse dialect for ast/symtable; files failing to parse under 3.9 are counted parse_failure and treated fail-closed as fully-unknown modules)
